query: Boulder Mountain Tour cross country ski race Ketchum / Sun Valley

videos.title: Nordic Skiing in Sun Valley, Idaho
videos.description: A glimpse in to the Nordic scene in Sun Valley, Idaho including the Nordic Festival and the Boulder Mountain Tour.

videos.title: Boulder Mtn Tour near Sun Valley, Idaho
videos.description:
43rd Boulder Mountain Tour near  Sun Valley on January 23, 2018.
Express video & photography by Roland Lane

videos.title: Boulder Mountain Tour 2012
videos.description: The Boulder Mountain Tour out of Ketchum is an American Ski Marathon Series race drawing over 900 racers. Clear skies allowed for a morning low of -12F leaving cold sharp snow on the track. Men's: Matt Liebsch, Lars Flora, Nils Koons, Women's Rebecca Dussault, Morgan Arritola, Chelsea Holmes.

videos.title: Boulder Mtn Tour 2016
videos.description: The 2016 Boulder Mountain Tour was staged this weekend on the course north of Ketchum. 757 racers enjoyed near perfect conditions for the 41st edition of the event.

videos.title: 2008 Boulder Mountain Tour
videos.description: Pre-race interview with the winner Mike Sinnott, clips from the start, slo-mo replay of the tight finish and podium from the premier Nordic race in the Ketchum Sun Valley, Idaho area and 2nd largest race in the nation

videos.title: 2007 Wells Fargo Boulder Mountain Tour
videos.description: 2007 Boulder Mountain Tour cross country ski race. The 32nd annual winter event in Sun Valley, Idaho

videos.title: Sun Valley Ski Education Foundation hosts a Super Tour nordic skiing event
videos.description: The U.S. Ski and Snowboard Association puts on a Super Tour where the best nordic skiers in the country compete against each other and this weekend the Sun Valley Ski Education Foundation hosted a series of races.
videos.transcript:
every winter the Sun Valley Ski
Education Foundation hosts a super Tour
event I'm outdoor reporter Steve dent
and not only does this event bring some
of the best Nordic skiers in the country
to Sun Valley it also allows the next

videos.title: 2012 Sun Valley Nordic Festival
videos.description: The 3rd annual Sun Valley Nordic Festival was held in Sun Valley, Idaho for 9 days from January 28 through February 5, 2012. The key events included "Ski The Rails", "Winter Sun Classic Race", Skin It To Win It" Downtown Jam and Nordic Sprints", "Sun Valley Demo Day", and was capped off with the "Boulder Mountain Tour." Nils Ribi Photography

videos.title: Loppet Foundation opens portion of cross-country skiing trails at Theodore Wirth
videos.description:
When it snows in October, many people in Minnesota are craving skiing. 

Marth Bardwell and her daughter Naomi couldn't resist. 

Just this week at Theodore Wirth Park, The Loppet Foundation opened a portion of the cross-country skiing trails. It's the earliest they've ever welcomed skiers and it's likely the first place in the state to make snow this year.

https://www.kare11.com/article/sports/loppet-foundation-opens-portion-of-cross-country-skiing-trails-at-theodore-wirth-park/89-bd2f1df2-a7fb-4122-bdfc-025e145cc830

videos.title: Sun Valley hosts the Boulder Mountain Tour for the 50th year and a local racer wins
videos.description: The Boulder Mountain Tour is a marathon style nordic race taking skiers from Galena Lodge down the mountain along the Harriman Trail for 34 kilometers.
videos.transcript:
